originalTitle: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
content: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

originalTitle: 'I was tortured and lost my hand' - one student's struggle to get an education in Nigeria
title: 'I was tortured and lost my hand' - one student's struggle to get an education in Nigeria
content: The BBC speaks to a student who pushed for his toe print to be taken to verify his identity.

originalTitle: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison for firing a gun
content: Malema is appealing against the decision, which means he is not going to prison immediately.

originalTitle: Southern Lebanon’s only functioning hospital damaged by Israeli strikes
title: Southern Lebanon’s only functioning hospital damaged by Israeli strikes
content: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto reports from Tibnin Hospital - the only functioning hospital in southern Lebanon.

originalTitle: Ukraine’s long-range strikes prompt new Russian threat against Europe
title: Ukraine’s long-range strikes prompt new Russian threat against Europe
content: Ukraine has penetrated Russian airspace with unprecedented numbers of drones, denying Russia windfall oil profits.

originalTitle: Men caught competing as women in prestigious South African marathon
title: Men caught competing as women in prestigious South African marathon
content: Two women runners initially finished outside the top 10 in the Two Oceans Marathon in Cape Town before bib swap spotted.

originalTitle: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
content: Brent crude sinks 10% after Iran says the key waterway is completely open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

originalTitle: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
content: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

originalTitle: What does the Saudi Arabia PIF's change in approach mean for Newcastle?
title: What does the Saudi Arabia PIF's change in approach mean for Newcastle?
content: Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) set out to disrupt, but the fund has sent tremors through the world of sport in a very different way this week.

title: Website part-owned by Boehly offers Chelsea FA Cup tickets for £1,705
content: A US-based website linked to Todd Boehly is selling Chelsea tickets at inflated prices, leaving the club's fans angry.

originalTitle: Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play
title: Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play
content: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says he enjoys watching Arsenal play as he can "learn a lot" from them.
